---
title: "Blog"
format:
  html:
    title-block: false
---

<div class="simple-page">
<a class="back-link" href="index.html">Home</a>

<h1>Coming soon!</h1>

<p>Some ideas I am thinking about writing about:</p>

<br>

<ol>
<li>Implementing <code>print(Hello, World)</code> at the lowest level I can, inspired by this video series: <a href="https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLowKtXNTBypFbtuVMUVXNR0z1mu7dp7eH">6502 microprocessor</a>.</li>

<br>

<li>Discussing <a href="https://www.shogan.co.uk/development/generating-music-with-markov-chains-and-alda/">Markov chains in music</a> and the current state of machine learning, including generative AI, in music.</li>

<br>

<li>
Analyzing the strategy and probability behind
<a href="https://www.dragonflycave.com/johto/voltorb-flip/">Voltorb Flip</a>,
a casino-style minigame from one of my favorite games,
<a href="https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Pok%C3%A9mon_HeartGold_and_SoulSilver">
Pokémon HeartGold and SoulSilver
</a>.
</li>

</ol>
</div>
